title: Register Knowledge
subtitle: Send files, web pages, or text from anywhere to teach the assistant.
destinationHelp: If similar knowledge already exists, it will be merged automatically without duplicates.
useReconciliationOn: Recommended: similar entities in the selected location will be reused and logged as aliases.
useReconciliationOff: Fresh extraction: every entity found in this registration becomes a new entity.
fileDropHint: Drag & drop a file here, or click to choose
fileTypes: PDF, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX, MD, TXT · up to {{sizeMb}} MB
apiGuideDesc: Use the REST API to push knowledge from external agents, scripts, or CI pipelines directly into this workspace.
apiGuideStep1Desc: Create a scoped API token in System > API Tokens, then pass it as Authorization: Bearer <token> on every request.
apiGuideStep2Desc: POST your content to the ingestions endpoint. The pipeline classifies it and applies or queues it for review automatically.
apiGuideFieldSourceName: Identifies your agent or integration (required, 1–200 chars)
apiGuideFieldIdempotencyKey: Unique key per document — same key is safe to retry (required)
apiGuideFieldContentType: MIME type of the text in rawPayload (default: text/plain)
apiGuideFieldTitleHint: Suggested page title, used when creating a new page (optional)
apiGuideFieldRawPayload: Your content object — include a text or body field at minimum
apiGuideResponseDesc: 202 Accepted — the job is queued. replayed: true means the idempotency key was already seen; the result is the same and it is safe to ignore.
apiGuideRateLimitsDesc: 60 requests / minute per user · 5 000 requests / day per workspace. Exceeding limits returns 429 with a Retry-After header.
